'''Tizon''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Tizon system/Legends|Tizon system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] and one of the original 13 planets of the [[Duskhan League]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}
